name: Specific Project Set-Asides

eligibility.description: Requires establishing to the IRS that the project can be better accomplished by a set-aside and will be paid within 5 years.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a foundation to treat amounts set aside for a specific project as a qualifying distribution for the current year, even if the money is not paid out immediately.
